# BaaChart

> BaaChart is a country-by-country sheep population explorer covering 1961 to 2021, built in conjunction with Social Media Executive (socialmediaexec.co.uk).

## What this site is

BaaChart visualises sheep population data from FAOSTAT alongside human population data from the World Bank. Each country page includes historical charts, sheep-to-people ratios, peak and lowest population stats, and a year-by-year data table.

## Data sources

- Sheep statistics: FAOSTAT (Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations) — https://www.fao.org/faostat/
- Human population: World Bank — https://data.worldbank.org/

## Built by

- Web design: Suedeapple — https://www.suedeapple.co.uk
- In conjunction with: Social Media Executive — https://socialmediaexec.co.uk
